items.title: The Muslim Holocaust, Muslim Genocide
items.subtitle: An interactive data anarchive of post-9/11 avoidable mortality
items.abstract: An interactive data visualization of Dr. Gideon Polya's research on the US-imposed post-9/11 Muslim Holocaust and Muslim Genocide — 32 million avoidable Muslim deaths across 20 countries (5 million from violence, 27 million from war-imposed deprivation). Features a live world map of avoidable death by nation, animated charts of mortality, refugee displacement, the colonial-era ledger (1950–2005), a chronology of interventions, the UN Genocide Convention standard, and Polya's climate-genocide projection. Figures are the author's documented avoidable-mortality estimates, presented faithfully with full attribution.

note: Auto-generated by scripts/build_archive_manifest.py — do not edit by hand.
